segments.text: Ascribe to the Lord, you heavenly beings,
ascribe to the Lord glory and strength.
segments.speaker: Psalmist (calling heavenly beings)

segments.text: Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name;
worship the Lord in the splendor of his holiness.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The voice of the Lord is over the waters;
the God of glory thunders, the Lord thunders over the mighty waters.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The voice of the Lord is powerful;
the voice of the Lord is majestic.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The voice of the Lord breaks the cedars;
the Lord breaks in pieces the cedars of Lebanon.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He makes Lebanon leap like a calf, Sirion like a young wild ox.
The voice of the Lord strikes with flashes of lightning.
The voice of the Lord shakes the desert;
the Lord shakes the Desert of Kadesh.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The voice of the Lord twists the oaks and strips the forests bare.
The Lord sits enthroned over the flood;
the Lord is enthroned as King forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord gives strength to his people; the Lord blesses his people with peace.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
